inputs.label: Net Amount (€)
inputs.businessContext: The price of the digital service excluding VAT.

businessContext_i18n.en: The price of the digital service excluding VAT.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Preis der digitalen Dienstleistung ohne MwSt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix du service numérique hors TVA.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio del servicio digital sin IVA.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سعر الخدمة الرقمية باستثناء ضريبة القيمة المضافة.

inputs.label: VAT Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: The VAT rate applicable in the consumer's EU member state.

businessContext_i18n.en: The VAT rate applicable in the consumer's EU member state.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüketicinin AB üye ülkesinde geçerli KDV oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der im EU-Mitgliedstaat des Verbrauchers geltende MwSt.-Satz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de TVA applicable dans l'État membre du consommateur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tipo de IVA aplicable en el estado miembro de la UE del consumidor.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة ضريبة القيمة المضافة المطبقة في الدولة العضو للاتحاد الأوروبي الخاصة بالمستهلك.

inputs.label: Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Number of units or services sold.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units or services sold.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der verkauften Einheiten oder Dienstleistungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités ou de services vendus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de unidades o servicios vendidos.

inputs.label: Discount (%)
inputs.businessContext: Discount percentage applied before VAT calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Discount percentage applied before VAT calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: KDV hesaplamasından önce uygulanan indirim yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rabatt in Prozent, der vor der MwSt.-Berechnung angewendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de remise appliqué avant le calcul de la TVA.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de descuento aplicado antes del cálculo del IVA.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الخصم المطبقة قبل حساب ضريبة القيمة المضافة.

inputs.label: Additional Costs (€)
inputs.businessContext: Any additional charges (e.g., processing fees) included in the taxable amount.

businessContext_i18n.en: Any additional charges (e.g., processing fees) included in the taxable amount.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi matrahına dahil edilen ek ücretler (ör. işlem ücretleri).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Gebühren (z. B. Bearbeitungsgebühren), die im steuerpflichtigen Betrag enthalten sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais supplémentaires (ex. : frais de traitement) inclus dans la base imposable.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cualquier cargo adicional (p. ej., tasas de procesamiento) incluido en la base imponible.
businessContext_i18n.ar: أي رسوم إضافية (مثل رسوم المعالجة) المضمنة في المبلغ الخاضع للضريبة.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
